description_long: This is a rectangular metal no parking sign mounted on two sturdy black metal legs. The sign face is white with bold red and black text, bordered by a black frame. The text reads 'NO PARKING 2AM to 6AM MON WED FRI', clearly indicating restricted parking times. The legs are thin, straight, and extend well below the sign, suggesting it is designed to be staked into the ground. The sign is utilitarian, with no decorative elements, and is typical of those found in urban environments to regulate street parking. The surface appears hard and slightly glossy, likely to withstand outdoor conditions.
description: A rectangular metal no parking sign with red and black text on a white background, mounted on two black metal legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full sign face with all text clearly visible and both supporting legs.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thin profile of the sign and legs, with no text visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, but the sign face is not visible; only the back and legs are seen.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and no visible text.
attribute_sign_text: NO PARKING 2AM to 6AM MON WED FRI
